subject: fix(seed): move seedIfEmpty to useWorkspaces so Demo workspace appears on first visit
body:
seedIfEmpty was called from useGraphData, which returns early when
workspaceId is null. New users land on the workspace manager with no
active workspace, so the seed never fired — they saw an empty workspace
manager with only the option to create a new workspace.

Moved seedIfEmpty to useWorkspaces hook, which runs on app startup
regardless of active workspace state. The Demo workspace now exists
before the workspace manager first renders.

Also reverts the Default workspace auto-creation from the previous
commit — only the Demo workspace is needed for first-visit experience.

Tags: seed, workspace, ux, first-visit, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: multiple-workspaces
Semver: patch
